Job Summary:

We are seeking a highly skilled Senior Data Scientist to join our India-based remote team. This role centers on constructing and deploying advanced predictive models to drive key business decisions. The ideal candidate should have robust experience in machine learning, data engineering, and cloud environments, particularly AWS. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy cutting-edge ML models using tools like SageMaker, Bedrock, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Jupyter Notebooks, and AWS Glue. Predictive Modeling & Machine Learning - Develop and deploy machine learning models for forecasting, optimization, and predictive analytics. - Utilize AWS SageMaker, Bedrock, LLMs, TensorFlow, and PyTorch for model training and deployment. - Perform model validation, tuning, and performance monitoring. - Deliver actionable insights from complex datasets to support strategic decision-making.

Data Engineering & Cloud Computing - Design scalable and secure ETL pipelines using AWS Glue. - Manage and optimize data infrastructure in the AWS environment. - Ensure high data integrity and availability across the pipeline. - Integrate AWS services to support the end-to-end machine learning lifecycle.

Python Programming - Write efficient, reusable Python code for data processing and model development. - Work with libraries like pandas, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch. - Maintain documentation and ensure best coding practices.

Collaboration & Communication - Collaborate with engineering, analytics, and business teams to solve business challenges. - Present complex models and insights to technical and non-technical stakeholders. - Participate in Agile sprints, planning, stand-ups, and reviews.

Preferred Experience (Nice to Have):

  • Exposure to Generative AI technologies.
  • Familiarity with geospatial data and GIS tools for predictive analytics.

Oracle Database Administrator (Cloud) – Job Description

Job Summary

Responsible for managing, securing, and optimizing Oracle databases in cloud and hybrid environments, with a focus on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI). Ensures high availability, performance, scalability, security, and cost efficiency for mission-critical applications.

Key Responsibilities

Cloud Database Administration (OCI-Focused) - Provision, configure, and manage Oracle Databases on OCI: - Oracle Autonomous Database (ATP/ADW) - Database Cloud Service (DBCS) - Exadata Cloud Service / Exadata Cloud@Customer - Manage Single Instance, RAC, CDB/PDB architectures in cloud environments. - Perform database lifecycle management: provisioning, scaling, cloning, patching, and decommissioning.

Hybrid & Migration Responsibilities - Support hybrid environments (on-prem + OCI). - Plan and execute database migrations to the cloud using RMAN, Data Pump, OCI Database Migration Service, and Goldengate (if applicable). - Validate performance and functionality post-migration. - Support cross-region and cross-tenancy architectures.

High Availability, DR & Resilience - Design and manage OCI Data Guard, automated backups, recovery, and cross-region disaster recovery. - Perform recovery testing and DR drills. - Ensure compliance with RTO/RPO objectives. - Manage rolling upgrades and patching with minimal downtime.

Performance & Cost Optimization - Monitor and tune databases using OCI Console, AWR/ADDM/ASH, and OCI Monitoring & Alarms. - Optimize storage, compute shapes, licensing, and resource utilization. - Implement cost-aware architectures and usage tracking (FinOps).

Security, Compliance & Governance - Implement cloud security best practices: IAM policies, network security (VCNs, NSGs, Security Lists), encryption (TDE, OCI Vault). - Manage database access controls, auditing, and separation of duties. - Support compliance requirements (ISO, SOX, GDPR, etc.). - Perform vulnerability remediation and security hardening.

Automation & DevOps Enablement - Automate database operations using Shell scripting, SQL/PLSQL, OCI CLI/SDK, Terraform/Ansible. - Integrate database changes into CI/CD pipelines. - Support Infrastructure as Code (IaC) for database provisioning. - Enable self-service patterns for development teams.

Monitoring, Incident & Operations Management - Set up proactive monitoring, alerts, and dashboards. - Troubleshoot cloud-specific issues (latency, connectivity, scaling). - Participate in 24x7 on-call rotations for production support. - Perform root cause analysis (RCA) and implement preventive controls.

Documentation & Cross-Team Collaboration - Maintain cloud architecture diagrams and operational runbooks. - Collaborate with cloud architects, DevOps engineers, application teams, security, and compliance teams. - Provide technical guidance and mentoring to junior DBAs.

Education & Certifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in computer science/IT or related field.
  • Preferred certifications: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Architect/DBA, Oracle Certified Professional (OCP), Exadata/Performance/Security certifications.

Soft Skills

  • Strong cloud troubleshooting mindset.
  • Automation-first approach.
  • Clear communication with technical and non-technical teams.
  • Ability to work independently in fast-paced cloud environments.
  • Ownership and accountability for production systems.

Experience Levels

  • Mid-Level: 3–5 years (1–2 years cloud exposure).

Working Location

  • Trivandrum, Kerala.

About MPT

Muthoot Pappachan Technologies (MPT) is the IT division of Muthoot Pappachan Group, providing cutting-edge IT solutions including cloud services, application development, ERP/loan management, and infrastructure management. Based at Technopark, Trivandrum, MPT serves both internal and external clients with a focus on innovation and technology.

Preferred Skills & Qualifications

Technical Skills - Strong hands-on experience with Oracle Database (12c/18c/19c/21c). - Proven experience in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI). - Expertise in RMAN, Data Guard, ASM, RAC, Multitenant (CDB/PDB), SQL/PLSQL, Linux administration, and database performance tuning.

Cloud-Specific Skills - OCI IAM, networking, and storage concepts. - Autonomous Database administration. - Cloud security and encryption. - Cost optimization and capacity planning in cloud. - IaC tools (Terraform preferred). - Monitoring and logging in OCI.

Preferred / Nice-to-Have Skills - Oracle Golden Gate. - Exadata Cloud Service. - Multi-cloud exposure (AWS RDS/Aurora, Azure SQL concepts). - Kubernetes-based application understanding. - ITIL/SRE practices. - DevSecOps exposure.
summary: Oracle Cloud Database Administrator with 3-5 years experience, specializing in OCI, Oracle DBA, and automation tools for cloud environments.
